title: Software Update - DFU - Headset low battery: dialog stays when HS is turned off
scenario: Low battery DFU warning dialog behavior differs between main screen and Settings page when headset is turned off
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Ensure the headset battery level is less than 5%.
5. Attempt to perform a DFU (firmware update) to trigger the low battery warning dialog.
6. Observe the dialog on the Home screen.
7. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off while the low battery dialog is still open on the Home screen.
8. Note the dialog behavior on the Home screen.
9. Turn the headset back on and reconnect.
10. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings (or any Settings page).
11. Attempt to perform a DFU (firmware update) again to trigger the low battery warning dialog on the Settings page.
12. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off while the low battery dialog is open on the Settings page.
13. Note the dialog behavior on the Settings page.
expected: The low battery DFU warning dialog should behave consistently across all app screens. Either the dialog should remain open until the user taps OK on all screens, or it should close automatically on all screens when the device disconnects.
